name: Speaking Event Overview: Who Cares If the Computer Breaks? - Testa Hurwitz & Thibeault (September 1995)
description: A September 12, 1995 letter from Peter Kastner to Donald Anglehart of Testa, Hurwitz & Thibeault law firm, enclosing a draft overview for a speaking event titled 'Who Cares If the Computer Breaks?' scheduled for October 18, 1995. The overview describes growing computer dependency, the high-availability and fault-tolerant systems industry, and the market opportunity created by distributed computing's reliability challenges across markets from home/SMB to large enterprises.
